name: Pooh Beach Resort & Spa
detail: I had a very enjoyable stay and I will come back again soon.

name: Sunday Beachfront View Jomtien Pattaya
detail: ‼️เป็นคอนโด แต่มาทำเป็นห้องพัก โดยรวมดีมากๆ คุ้มค่ากับห้องพักราคานี้ พร้อมอาหารเช้า โลเคชั่นถือว่าดี ใกล้ร้านสะดวกซื้อ ร้านอาหาร ใกล้ทะเล ค่ำๆมีร้านให้นั่งชิวๆ ฟังเพลง พนักงานต้อนรับอัธยาศรัยดี มี รปภ. ที่จอดรถๆได้ประมาณ 10-12คัน พักอาคาร Dชั้น 5 wifiแรงดีมากๆ ห้องพักสะอาด ห้องน้ำดี แต่ที่ระบายน้ำอยู่สูงนิดนึงเวลาอายน่ำตีองใช้เท้ากวาดน้ำให้ไหลลงท่อ ชั้นบนมีสระว่ายน้ำ ขนาดไม่ใหญ่ แต่ก็พอเล่นได้ พร้อมห้องฟิตเนส พร่อมที่นั่ง เล่น ค่ำๆถ่ายรูปวิวทะเล ‼️ ช่วงเข้าพักมีทัวร์จีนมาลงเต็ม แต่ก็ไม่รบกวนเท่าไหร่ ช่วงเช้าพนักงานแนะนำให้ลงมาทายอาหารสายนิดนึง เพราะช่วงเช้าประมาณหกโมงถึงเจ็ดโมง กลุ่มทัวร์จะลงมาทานกันก็ไม่เป็นไรเพราะปกติลงมาประมาณแปดโมงอยู่แล้ว อาหารรสชาดกลางๆ รับได้ ❤️❤️❤️โดยรวมให้ผ่านครับ กับที่พักราคานี้พร้อมอาหารเช้า คราวหน้าคงมาพักที่นี่อีกครับ

name: Boutique City And Bravo Hotel Pattaya
detail: There are too many options in Pattaya, at the same price point, that have RELIABLE internet and non-anemic air conditioners. This hotel is in a good location and the staff are great; however, that can be said of many hotels in Pattaya. If you drive a vehicle to this hotel, there is a good chance your vehicle will be trapped in the parking lot when you want to use it. The internet was available, maybe, 30% of the time we tried it, and we slept above the blanket because the A.C. was terrible. The maintenance people said it takes a while for it to get cold. Apparently, a while is more than 2 days.

name: Penthouse Pattaya
detail: It was a great room for both single travellers and couples.
area: Pattaya Beach Road,Pattaya - View on map

name: Arbour Hotel and Residence Pattaya
detail: The rooftop bar and restaurant is absolutely amazing.

name: Cholchan Pattaya Beach Resort
detail: Aside from the mucky, garbage-filled beach, this resort is lovely. It does offer a free shuttle to the main party beach of Pattaya, but since my family isn't into that, we were a bit disappointed with how gross their private beach was. It definitely has one of the best pools we've ever swam in, with varying depths suited for the whole family, though! The beds are hard, but that's very typical in Thailand. It's definitely a nice place to stay, just be prepared to travel elsewhere for activities/shopping/beach fun.
area: Bang La Mung,Pattaya - View on map

name: April Suites Pattaya
detail: i had called ahead to confirm my reservation and ask a few questions and the people who answered the phone all spoke very good English and before i even arrived i had a good impression of the place. easy to get too, the hotel is right off of Pattaya Klang/Central Pattaya Road and it only took 10 minutes to get to from the bus terminal on North Pattaya Road/Pattaya Nuea by motorcycle taxi (50 Baht fare) and it is 10 min walk to Beach Road. April Suites was recommended to me by a friend and upon arrival i was pleasantly surprised to see that it was exactly like the photos on the website, even better. check in was fast and trouble free, they had all the paper work started prior to my arrival and i was in my room relaxing within 10 minutes. the hotel is fairly new & everything was in perfect shape, the room is sensibly & beautifully furnished, THE BED IS FANTASTIC, bathrooms are well laid out & i had hot water & good pressure on demand at all times which is not always the case in Pattaya hotels. the room has a big flat screen TV, an OK sized desk/work area & the WiFi was never a problem (not super fast, but i was always able to work with ease). it is one of the only rooms i have stayed in anywhere, at any price, that has enough electrical outlets, in all the right places & they were grounded. for a business traveler with a computer this is a big plus. one of the best features of the hotel is the nice quiet roof-top pool area. great sofa beds & umbrellas, the area & the pool itself are spotlessly clean & the staff are attentive & once again, speak great English. there is a small but decent gym & a fantastic, clean, HOT sauna. the few times i ordered drinks they came quickly & are not overpriced. i did not try the food so i cannot comment. there is a large frig & you can stock it by going to the Tops Market located on the corner to across Pattaya Sai 2. i have stayed in every room type & all are good & spacious & the suite room was like a smal

name: Golden Beach Hotel
detail: Golden Beach Hotel will be one of the choice. We received a good service during checked in and since we are booked for 3 rooms, they are able to put us in one floor together. The hotel has a nice, tidy and comfortable bed, spacious bedroom and comfort room, have a balcony with laundry rod wherein you can hang wet clothes, good tv channel selection and they also provide complimentary bottled water which other hotel do not. We enjoy the variety of buffet breakfast. For the location, the hotel is right across Central Festival Mall and just a walking distance to beach. To think about it, paying for this hotel is reasonably acceptable. Overall we are happy with our stay and will definitely come back on our next Pattaya trip.

name: Shilat Avenue Pattaya
detail: Very clean and modern rooms, great staff and great location.
